invalidity_product.name: Invalidity - Product Prior Art
invalidity_product.description: Search for product evidence: datasheets, catalogs, brochures, press releases

wayback.strategy: Search archived manufacturer and distributor sites for product pages, datasheets, press releases

fcc.strategy: Search FCC equipment authorization database for exhibits containing datasheets

ptab.strategy: Extract NPL exhibits from IPRs against the target patent

usenet.strategy: Search USENET for engineer discussions mentioning the product

university.strategy: Search university lab pages and course materials for equipment mentions

distributor.strategy: Search distributor archives for old datasheets and product catalogs

archive_texts.strategy: Search trade magazines and technical publications

github.strategy: Search open source projects for datasheets and documentation

forums.strategy: Search technical forums for product discussions with dates

invalidity_npl.name: Invalidity - NPL (Journal Articles)
invalidity_npl.description: Search for academic papers, conference proceedings, technical reports

ptab.strategy: Extract NPL exhibits from related IPRs

university.strategy: Search thesis repositories and research publications

archive_texts.strategy: Search conference proceedings and technical journals

github.strategy: Search research code repositories and documentation

copyright.name: Copyright Research
copyright.description: Search for existing translations, publications, recordings

wayback.strategy: Search archived websites for existing translations

usenet.strategy: Search USENET for discussions about translations

university.strategy: Search university libraries and digital collections

archive_texts.strategy: Search Internet Archive for books, hymnals, recordings
